summary: B7: src/lib/boot.ts — assert first chunk embedding length=768 and Ollama reachable (GET /api/tags lists nomic-embed-text:v1.5)

analysis.author: anonlessness
analysis.content: Deferred to Phase C. B7 adds Ollama dim/reachability assertions to src/lib/boot.ts, but boot.ts is created by C10 — the file does not exist yet. When C10 runs (Phase C branch todo/6157e231), implement B7 immediately after on the same branch and close it from there. Re-checking out todo/7717ec96 just to add lines to boot.ts would create branch churn for no benefit.
